description: 建立 staging candidate 與 production release 的分層 gate：先全量進 staging，再以 lesson/unit allowlist 發佈 production，避免 core dialogue/video 全量直進 production。

tasks.desc: Freeze the release manifest schema, including unit_id, lesson_id, release_status, content_type, course_type, source_refs, contract_version, viewer_verified, qa_gate_passed, and staging_only.

subtasks.desc: Draft release manifest schema spec (A1-A2 focus)
Define field governance & status enum values

tasks.desc: Define the boundary between staging catalog and production manifest so staging can hold all candidates while production only accepts allowlisted lesson/unit entries.

subtasks.desc: Draft Staging vs Production boundary doc
Establish lesson/unit as the authoritative release unit

tasks.desc: Change the production assembler contract to read allowlisted lessons only, and stop it from directly scanning all core dialogue/video sources.

subtasks.desc: Implement assembler cutover to read from Release Manifest

tasks.desc: Map the migration path from the current manifest/lesson_catalog shape to the new release manifest flow, including compatibility rules and cutover notes.

subtasks.desc: Execute initial seed by joining manifest.json & lesson_catalog.json

tasks.desc: Pilot the release gate with dialogue and video first, using staging-only candidates and a small allowlisted lesson set before broader rollout.
Write verification and rollback notes for the release gate, including how to detect manifest mismatch, fail closed, and revert to the prior production bundle.
